name: TME — Consumable Modifiers
description: Built-in consumable modifiers. One-time-use effects that trigger when the item is consumed.

flavor.title: Last Stand
flavor.description: If you are being downed, you may choose to consume this item to keep standing with 1 HP
flavor.disclaimer: Consume effects do not require the item to be equipped or attuned

flavor.title: Arcane Hunger?
flavor.description: This item can be eaten to restore a cantrip slot
flavor.disclaimer: Deals the weapon's damage upon consumption

flavor.title: Arcane Hunger
flavor.description: This item can be eaten to restore a 1st level spell slot
flavor.disclaimer: Deals the weapon's damage upon consumption

flavor.title: Greater Arcane Hunger
flavor.description: This item can be eaten to restore a 3rd level spell slot
flavor.disclaimer: Deals twice the weapon's damage upon consumption

flavor.title: Severe Arcane Hunger
flavor.description: This item can be eaten to restore your highest available spell slot
flavor.disclaimer: Deals four times the weapon's damage upon consumption. Not suited for wizards of Waterdeep

flavor.title: Edible
flavor.description: Despite its properties, this item is edible and counts as multiple rations
